title: Blope
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Image}}
'''Blopes''' were large, quadrupedal swamp creatures that dwelt in the marshy areas on the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|80|Blope}}</ref>

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the Scenes==
According to the [[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia|''Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia'']], Blopes were analogous to real life [[Wikipedia:Hippopotamus|Hippopotamus]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
